overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dark, neon-lit covered market. The player approaches a food stall with teal lighting, briefly stops to observe the vendor, then continues walking through the crowded market passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk night market with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market passage toward a food stall

entered.detail: dark industrial ceiling structure with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging from the ceiling
various illuminated signs including a prominent green/teal sign
teal-colored counter with bright lighting and a circular yellow sign above

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark, covered cyberpunk market illuminated by red hanging lanterns and neon signs. The camera moves steadily forward through moderate crowds toward a brightly lit food stall with a teal counter visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall with teal counter and circular signage

events.description: slows down and stops at the food stall counter
brief observation of vendor behind the counter

agents.ego_description: stopping at the food stall counter and observing the vendor preparing items

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the teal counter, working with items on the preparation surface

entered.detail: circular yellow illuminated sign with black text above the food stall
vertical glowing blue menu displays mounted on the wall
bright green bar stool in front of the counter

segments.scene_description: The player stops at a food stall with a teal counter and circular yellow signage. A vendor NPC stands behind the counter working, while digital menu screens glow blue on the left wall. The camera remains focused on the stall area for several seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: market passage with metal cage structures

events.description: turns around and begins walking away from the food stall

agents.ego_description: walking away from the food stall through the market passage

notable_agents.action: seated customer in green jacket sitting at the food stall counter

entered.detail: large industrial light fixture enclosed in metal caging on the left wall
narrow passage between market stalls with various goods

segments.scene_description: The player turns and walks away from the food stall, passing a seated customer in a green jacket. The camera moves through a narrow market aisle with a prominent caged industrial light fixture on the left wall, while other pedestrians walk in the opposing direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with caged storage areas

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market corridor passing various stalls and shoppers

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling metal mesh caging with bright lighting inside on the left side
bright neon sign with triangular shape visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the covered market corridor, passing by metal cage structures with bright interior lighting on the left. The passage is lined with various market stalls and neon signage, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving through the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, neon-lit covered market that transitions from a wide approach to a focused interaction and back into a crowded corridor. It begins by moving steadily through a dim passage illuminated by red hanging lanterns and neon signs, drawing closer to a brightly lit food stall with a teal counter. As the camera reaches the stall, the movement pauses to observe a vendor working beneath circular yellow signage and glowing blue digital menus. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away, passing a seated customer in a green jacket and moving through a narrow aisle marked by a caged industrial light fixture. Finally, the path opens back into the main market corridor, gliding past metal cage structures and various stalls while navigating through a steady stream of pedestrians.
